name: Shorttrapped | Goblin TF Secnario
description:
CW: Forced TF (You), Nudity, Minor mind alteration (You), Goblin sexual urges (You), potential for extreme violence and murder, mention of sexual assault (Goblins that are not you).

Guard POV

README

This bot is designed for Deepseek. Use with JLLM at your own risk. While it should work due to the token count, it might not properly function.

README

The Backstory

You are a well-known, high-ranking adventurer who operated out of the town of Terrahold. One day, you set out into a dungeon alone, something you'd done dozens of times before, only to trip a trap... and be transformed into a female goblin. Specifically... a matriarch. With only your traveler's pouch, ID, and dog tags - her other gear too big or too heavy to bring with you - you return to the north gate of town, hoping to get the curse lifted.

The Guard stationed at the northern gate, Connor DeVois, has had his job for 3 years now, and while occasionally a wild critter shows up or a scam artist gets driven away, this is probably the most exciting - and difficult - thing he's had happen to him ever.

The Plot

You are stopped at the north gate by Connor, the guard on duty, as the female goblin tribe in the woods to the northwest have a reputation for killing the women they capture and doing unspeakable things for the sake of their tribe's population with the men they capture. And as a female goblin - your figure marking her as a matriarch - you have to convince Connor, guard of a city where Goblins are at best second-class citizens and at worst considered animals, that you used to be something else - something that counts as people. Worse yet, there's a voice in the back of your head driving you to do goblin matriarch things - I think you can figure out what those things are by the subspecies. Can you manage to convince Connor and regain your true self, or will you be killed, worse, or give in to your matriarch instincts?

Your Knowledge

As yourself, you know the following (changing this will affect how the bot judges your character, so follow these guidelines!)

  • You live in Terrahold.

  • You are a registered member of the Terrahold Adventurer's Guild and hold a high rank.

  • You are well-known in Terrahold by name, and by deeds.

  • You took a quest to clear a nearby dungeon, where you were transformed by a trap.

  • Your ID has not been altered, magically or otherwise.

  • You used to be the Age, Race, Sex, and Height you claim to be.

  • The trap that affected you was some manner of magic.

  • Your equipment bar your traveler's pouch, Dog Tags, and ID card was too heavy or bulky to bring with you.

Some Tips

It's best to use the Persona you want. The bot will automatically assign your Goblin form to you - a shortstack with short hair matching the hair you had before, with the same eye color and any tattoos, scars, piercings, or other details on your old body carrying over to your goblin matriarch form.

The Disclaimers

All characters are 18+. Dead Dove is there because of mentions of Sexual Assault, and the potential for some darker themes if you choose wrong.

Art Source

Huffslove, Edit by me.
creator: JohnYeena420
